response:
The serum and follicular fluid (FF) levels of 25OH-VD, as well as FF levels of TNF-α, 25OH-VD, and TAC, were measured using enzyme-linked immunosorbent assay (ELISA) kits according to the manufacturer's instructions. Results were read using a 96-well microplate ELISA reader. Specifically:

*   Human serum 25-OHVD levels were measured with an ELISA kit ([Catalog Number]) by quantitative sandwich enzyme immunoassay technique ([Reference]).
*   Human serum TNF-α levels were measured with an ELISA kit ([Catalog Number]) by quantitative sandwich enzyme immunoassay technique ([Reference]).
*   Human serum TAC levels were measured with an ELISA kit ([Catalog Number]) by quantitative sandwich enzyme immunoassay technique ([Reference]).

*Note: Specific catalog numbers, manufacturer names (e.g., Abcam Inc.), locations (e.g., San Francisco, USA), and specific reference citations have been replaced with generic placeholders to remove potential PII and proprietary details while preserving the scientific context.*
